title: 健身
description_uz: «Salomatlik uchun bir oz pul sarflashning hech qanday muammosi yo'q.» — Bir do'st sport zaliga qatnay boshlagan o'rtog'idan tartib, narx va natijalar haqida so'raydi. Bu dialog ko'rsatma so'rash, tavsiya berish va arzish-arzimasligini muhokama qilishni mashq qiladi. Foydali, motivatsion mavzu. Tinglab takrorlab, ravonlikni mustahkamlang.
description_ru: «Ради здоровья потратить немного денег — не страшно.» — Один друг расспрашивает другого, начавшего ходить в спортзал, о расписании, цене и результатах. Этот диалог тренирует расспросы, советы и обсуждение, стоит ли оно того. Полезная, мотивирующая тема. Слушайте и повторяйте, закрепляя беглость речи.
description_en: «For your health, spending a bit of money is no big deal.» — One friend quizzes another who's started going to the gym about schedule, price, and results. This dialogue practices asking for details, giving recommendations, and discussing whether something is worth it. A useful, motivating topic. Listen and repeat to lock in your fluency.

sentences.text_original: 你最近好像瘦了，是不是在运动？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuìjìn hǎoxiàng shòu le, shì bú shì zài yùndòng?
sentences.text_translation: Yaqinda ozgandeksan, sport bilan shug'ullanyapsanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты, кажется, похудел в последнее время — занимаешься спортом?
sentences.text_translation_en: You seem to have lost weight lately — are you exercising?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对。我三个月前开始去健身房了。
sentences.pinyin: Duì. Wǒ sān ge yuè qián kāishǐ qù jiànshēnfáng le.
sentences.text_translation: Ha. Uch oy oldin sport zaliga qatnay boshladim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Три месяца назад я начал ходить в спортзал.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah. I started going to the gym three months ago.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你一周去几次？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yì zhōu qù jǐ cì?
sentences.text_translation: Haftasiga necha marta borasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько раз в неделю ходишь?
sentences.text_translation_en: How many times a week do you go?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 一周去四次，周一到周四。
sentences.pinyin: Yì zhōu qù sì cì, zhōuyī dào zhōusì.
sentences.text_translation: Haftasiga to'rt marta, dushanbadan payshanbagacha.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Четыре раза в неделю, с понедельника по четверг.
sentences.text_translation_en: Four times a week, Monday to Thursday.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你一般练什么？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yìbān liàn shénme?
sentences.text_translation: Odatda nimani mashq qilasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что ты обычно тренируешь?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you usually train?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 跑步热身，然后做一些力量训练。
sentences.pinyin: Pǎobù rèshēn, ránhòu zuò yì xiē lìliàng xùnliàn.
sentences.text_translation: Yugurib qizib olaman, keyin biroz kuch mashqlarini qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Разминаюсь бегом, потом делаю силовые упражнения.
sentences.text_translation_en: I warm up with running, then do some strength training.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 请教练了吗？
sentences.pinyin: Qǐng jiàoliàn le ma?
sentences.text_translation: Murabbiy yolladingmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты нанял тренера?
sentences.text_translation_en: Did you hire a coach?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 请了。教练帮我制定了计划。
sentences.pinyin: Qǐng le. Jiàoliàn bāng wǒ zhìdìng le jìhuà.
sentences.text_translation: Yolladim. Murabbiy menga reja tuzib berdi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нанял. Тренер составил для меня план.
sentences.text_translation_en: I did. The coach drew up a plan for me.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 效果好明显啊！
sentences.pinyin: Xiàoguǒ hǎo míngxiǎn a!
sentences.text_translation: Natijasi juda sezilarli ekan!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Результат очень заметный!
sentences.text_translation_en: The results are really noticeable!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 谢谢！主要是比以前有精神了。
sentences.pinyin: Xièxie! Zhǔyào shì bǐ yǐqián yǒu jīngshen le.
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat! Asosiysi, avvalgidan ko'ra tetikroq bo'lib qoldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо! Главное, у меня стало больше энергии, чем раньше.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks! The main thing is I have more energy than before.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 一个月多少钱？
sentences.pinyin: Yí ge yuè duōshao qián?
sentences.text_translation: Oyiga qancha turadi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько стоит в месяц?
sentences.text_translation_en: How much is it a month?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 会员费三百块，私教课另算。
sentences.pinyin: Huìyuán fèi sānbǎi kuài, sījiào kè lìngsuàn.
sentences.text_translation: A'zolik to'lovi uch yuz yuan, shaxsiy murabbiy darslari alohida hisoblanadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Членский взнос — триста юаней, занятия с персональным тренером считаются отдельно.
sentences.text_translation_en: The membership fee is three hundred yuan; personal training sessions are charged separately.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你觉得值得吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ juéde zhídé ma?
sentences.text_translation: Seningcha bu arziydimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Думаешь, оно того стоит?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you think it's worth it?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 非常值得。为了健康，花点钱没关系。
sentences.pinyin: Fēicháng zhídé. Wèile jiànkāng, huā diǎn qián méi guānxi.
sentences.text_translation: Juda arziydi. Salomatlik uchun bir oz pul sarflashning hech qanday muammosi yo'q.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень даже стоит. Ради здоровья потратить немного денег — не страшно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Totally worth it. For your health, spending a bit of money is no big deal.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我也想去办一张卡，但是怕自己坚持不了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng qù bàn yì zhāng kǎ, dànshì pà zìjǐ jiānchí bù liǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Men ham karta ochmoqchiman, lekin o'zim davom ettira olmasligimdan qo'rqaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже хочу оформить карту, но боюсь, что не смогу заниматься регулярно.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'd like to get a membership too, but I'm afraid I won't stick with it.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你可以先办月卡试试，觉得好再续。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ xiān bàn yuèkǎ shì shi, juéde hǎo zài xù.
sentences.text_translation: Avval oylik abonement ochib ko'rsang bo'ladi, yaxshi desang keyin uzaytirasan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можешь сначала оформить месячный абонемент на пробу, а если понравится — продлить.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can get a monthly pass first to try it, and renew if you like it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好主意。你平时几点去？
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo zhǔyi. Nǐ píngshí jǐ diǎn qù?
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi fikr. Odatda soat nechada borasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошая идея. Во сколько ты обычно ходишь?
sentences.text_translation_en: Good idea. What time do you usually go?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我下班后直接去，大概七点左右到。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiàbān hòu zhíjiē qù, dàgài qī diǎn zuǒyòu dào.
sentences.text_translation: Ishdan keyin to'g'ridan-to'g'ri boraman, taxminan yettilarda yetib boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Иду сразу после работы, прихожу примерно к семи.
sentences.text_translation_en: I go straight there after work and arrive around seven.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那个时间人多不多？
sentences.pinyin: Nà ge shíjiān rén duō bu duō?
sentences.text_translation: O'sha vaqtda odam ko'pmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: В это время много людей?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is it crowded at that time?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还可以。周末人比较多，我一般不去。
sentences.pinyin: Hái kěyǐ. Zhōumò rén bǐjiào duō, wǒ yìbān bú qù.
sentences.text_translation: Yomon emas. Dam olish kunlari odam ko'proq bo'ladi, odatda bormayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Терпимо. По выходным людей побольше, поэтому я обычно не хожу.
sentences.text_translation_en: It's okay. On weekends it's more crowded, so I usually don't go.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好的，我考虑一下。有不懂的再问你。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ kǎolǜ yí xià. Yǒu bù dǒng de zài wèn nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, o'ylab ko'raman. Tushunmagan joyim bo'lsa, yana sendan so'rayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, я подумаю. Если что-то будет непонятно, ещё спрошу у тебя.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I'll think about it. If there's anything I don't get, I'll ask you again.
sentences.speaker: A
